scope: Revisão independente do pacote N8N_Pizzaria(1).zip contra os critérios dos Prompts 0 e 1.

blockers.detail: Prompt 0 required read-only Supabase introspection, but the prior package records a live structural migration.
Deactivation log says 13 inactive/243 active; final report says 14 inactive/242 active; final live row read was unavailable through the connector.
The ZIP asserts user authorization but does not include the explicit confirmation required by Prompt 1.
Original checksum manifest covered only 0-etapa, not 1-etapa.
